verdict: PASS_VISUAL_AGENT (deep red glossy apple, soft cream/teal background gradient, faint chromatic-aberration outline near stem visible at preview resolution but coherent)
regression_check_vs_pre_phase15: Wall-clock 36.61 s vs pre-Phase-1.5 reference 73.98 s — significantly faster (likely warmer cuDNN cache + no concurrent process this run). Compiled path is untouched by Phase 1.5 (autotune scoped to Triton kernels), so improvement is environmental, not architectural.
tiling_activation: op-level tiling on convolution::62 (the 36 GiB op pre-chantier); decoder runs as 4×4 tile grid
